prestazioni: Engine swap to 1MZ-FE V6 (3.0L, 24-valve DOHC) with a custom forced-induction setup using a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R, ball-bearing) paired with a Tomei 260° camshaft kit (intake/exhaust lift: 8.5mm/8.2mm) and a GReddy intercooler (front-mount, 600x300x76mm core) for sustained boost levels of 1.2 bar (17.4 psi).

Full bolt-on reinforcement with a TRD Japan 1MZ-FE reinforced engine block (forged internals), HKS Hi-Power exhaust system (2.5-inch piping, titanium tips), and a custom 3-inch downpipe with a GReddy E-Manage Ultimate piggyback ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping (MAF scaling adjusted for 350-380 WHP target).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 30-way rebound, 15mm ride height adjustment) paired with Cusco front and rear strut tower bars (22mm diameter, 3-point design) and a Whiteline rear sway bar (22mm, adjustable end links) to eliminate body roll during high-speed cornering on JDM touge roads.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated canards, and a duckbill rear spoiler) painted in Toyota Super White II (040) with a 3M Matte Black (1080) roof and mirror caps for contrast.

Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9.5 +35 front, 18x10.5 +40 rear) wrapped in Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R tires (245/40/18 front, 275/35/18 rear) with custom gold hardware and Toyo Proxes R888R spares for track days.

Interior overhaul with Bride Zeta III bucket seats (fixed-back, FIA-approved) upholstered in black Alcantara with red stitching, a Nardi Classic 380mm steering wheel (perforated leather, 3-spoke), and a custom roll cage (6-point, TIG-welded, chromoly steel) painted in Toyota Racing Development (TRD) red (042) for structural rigidity and aesthetic cohesion.
